---
title: "After 37 Years, Voyager 1 Fires Up Its Thrusters"
description: "37 years out in the cold and radiation. Still kicking."
author: "synesis"
date: "2017-12-02"
categories: [space, science, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![After 37 years, Voyager 1 has fired up its trajectory thrusters. Image from [Ars Technica](https://arstechnica.com/science/2017/12/after-37-years-voyager-has-fired-up-its-trajectory-thrusters/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

37 years out in the cold and radiation. Still kicking.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_after-37-years-voyager-1-has-fired-up-its-activity-6342559835413979136-Eyz7).*
